description: Rule-based FINPLE Data Sentinel baseline for app-ready screener and simulator assets.

rules.description: Ticker is missing or does not match the expected market format.
A required identity field is missing.
MDD is outside the configured valid range.
A metric field is present but cannot be parsed as a number.
Expected CAGR is missing after app-ready overlay merge.
Beta is missing after app-ready overlay merge.
MDD is missing after app-ready overlay merge.
Data years is missing after app-ready overlay merge.
Expected CAGR is outside the configured review range.
Beta is outside the configured review range.
Dividend yield is above the configured review range.
Dividend yield is missing and is not confirmed as zero.
Dividend policy marks the asset as needing review.
Price metrics status marks the asset as needing review.
10-year price metric is present but available data years are below the configured 10-year threshold.
Available price history is shorter than the configured baseline.
Dividend yield is confirmed as zero and should not be treated as missing.
